text: gale-backend-jvm-vector: JVM-only SIMD gemm via jdk.incubator.vector. VectorDenseDoubleKernel.gemm SIMD-accelerates the fully-row-major case (i-k-j broadcast-FMA over lane groups + scalar tail), falls back to pure for any strided/transposed operand; L1/L2/syrk forward to pure. given vectorBackend routes through the seam (Vectorized capability). Added private[gale] DoubleArray.asArray (JVM-only) for raw-array SIMD loads. Build: root .jvmopts + Test/javaOptions --add-modules=jdk.incubator.vector. TWO fresh-context reviews (implementer + adversarial kernel review): both SAFE, no correctness bugs (traced lane-tail, submatrix bounds, beta order, zero-dims, aliasing). Hardened tests per review: submatrix view, random-input tolerance bound, column-strided-C fallback. Placeholder threshold 32^3 pending measurement bead. Green all modules: vectorBackend 17, coreJVM 365, coreJS 362, laws 30/30, interop 16, parity 29.
